signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's consumer price index rose to +2.7% year-on-year in March 2026, the highest since January 2024 (+2.9%), driven by a +7.2% surge in energy prices amid the Iran war; this exceeds February's +1.9% and pre-war forecasts near 2%.[1][2]
